title: Traben's 3D armor models
description: Makes vanilla armor 3D using ETF + EMF
body:
makes armor 3D using the [Entity Model Features mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

see the gallery for some examples

comes with its own armor textures as they have some uv mapping differences, other resourcepacks will not work without edits

# requires EMF 2.1+ to work
